capabilities.description: Dynamic switching between AI 'Souls' or personalities, affecting system prompt and behavior.
capabilities.verification_step: Press F3, select a personality, verify config.json updates.
capabilities.notes: Accessible via F3 shortcut in CLI.

capabilities.description: Switching between AI backends (Ollama, Kobold, Cloud) and selecting specific local models.
capabilities.verification_step: Press F2, switch model, check if backend connects successfully.
capabilities.notes: Accessible via F2 shortcut in CLI. Impacts performance.

capabilities.description: On-the-fly modification of AI behavior using the /istruzione or /instruction commands.
capabilities.verification_step: Type /istruzione test, check if AI follows 'test'.

capabilities.description: Engages an unstructured roleplay session bypassing tool restrictions.
